# Wisdom Wealth International School (WWIS)

Wisdom Wealth International School (WWIS) is an international school in Trichy, Tamil Nadu. The school follows the Cambridge CIE curriculum and positions itself around the promise: "Schools focus on class. WWIS focuses on the individual child."

## Programs

- iPlay (Pre-KG to Grade 2): learning through play, social and emotional development, early communication skills, 24 skills, 3 languages, and brain development focus.
- iDiscover (Grade 3 to Grade 7): curiosity-driven learning, problem-solving, exploration, creativity, 24 projects, and 8 professional skills.
- iLead (Grade 8 to Grade 12): leadership, collaboration, innovation, future readiness, 3 career programs, and 5 internships.
- Cambridge CIE Curriculum: international standards, critical thinking, communication skills, and global citizenship.
- Individual Learning Plans: personalized support for every student.

## Admissions

Admissions are open from Pre-KG to higher grades based on seat availability. Age criteria should be confirmed with the admissions office.

Process: Inquiry -> Campus Visit -> Parent Counseling -> Student Assessment if applicable -> Document Submission -> Fee Payment -> Enrollment Confirmation -> Orientation.

Detailed fees are not displayed publicly. Parents should request the fee structure from admissions.

## Facilities, Sports, Clubs, And Resources

Facilities include smart classrooms, science labs, computer labs, library, sports facilities, activity rooms, transport services, medical room, auditorium, play areas, safety systems, and CCTV monitoring.

Sports are presented as a major school strength with structured coaching, inter-school competitions, and student development opportunities.

Clubs include robotics, coding, music, dance, art, chess, debate, public speaking, entrepreneurship, environmental club, and community service.

Parent resources include academic calendar, circulars, parent handbook, uniform information, transport details, downloadable forms, parent login/app links, and exam schedules.
